Title: virtuoso_ini_path
Description: Return full name of configuration INI file

This function returns the complete path to the configuration
    INI file. It is typically used by the cfg_ functions that
    modify or read the contents of the INI file.
Examples:
SQL> select virtuoso_ini_path();
callret
VARCHAR
D:\Program Files\OpenLink\Virtuoso 2.5\demo\demo.ini
1 Rows. -- 60 msec.
